evidence.description: Ahmad Khomeini served as the conduit through whom Ayatollah Mousavi Ardebili relayed questions about the fatwa to Ruhollah Khomeini, and through whom Khomeini's responses — unequivocally extending the death sentence — were returned. His role was to transmit the fatwa clarifications that operationalized the executions.

editorial_notes: Ahmad did not directly carry out the executions but served as the fatwa relay mechanism that enabled the death commission's decisions.
